summary: Phone Number Assignment Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend API tests (12/12 passed) and Frontend UI tests verified that: 1) Admin sees all org phone numbers in Inbox dropdown, 2) Agent sees only their assigned numbers, 3) Assignment/unassignment works correctly via PUT /api/phone-numbers/{id}, 4) PhoneNumbers page allows admins to assign numbers to team members.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing phone numbers in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone number assignment feature is fully working. Admin (john@acmefunding.com) sees all 3 org numbers in Inbox. Agent (mike@acmefunding.com) sees only their 2 assigned numbers. PhoneNumbers page allows admins to assign/unassign numbers to team members.

GET /api/phone-numbers/owned - Admin.description: Admin sees all 3 phone numbers in their org

GET /api/phone-numbers/owned - Agent.description: Agent sees only 2 numbers assigned to them

PUT /api/phone-numbers/{id} - Assign.description: Admin can assign number to agent, org_id is updated

PUT /api/phone-numbers/{id} - Unassign.description: Admin can unassign number (set assigned_user_id to null)

PUT /api/phone-numbers/{id} - Agent Deni.description: Agent gets 403 when trying to update phone numbers

Inbox - Admin Phone Dropdown.description: Admin sees all 3 numbers in 'Send from' dropdown after selecting client

Inbox - Agent Phone Dropdown.description: Agent sees only 2 assigned numbers in 'Send from' dropdown

PhoneNumbers Page - Assignment Dialog.description: Admin can open assignment dialog and see all team members

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS sending: MOCKED - no real messages are sent
